identity: Disciplined human male, clean-shaven, black hair tied in a topknot, sharp brown eyes, lean athletic build.
outfit: Studded leather chestpiece over a dark tunic, leather pauldrons, bracers on both forearms, martial belt with hanging cloth sash. Brown trousers, leather boots.
weapons: A polished wooden quarterstaff held diagonally across the body, both hands in a balanced grip.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-strike, quarterstaff thrust forward at chest level, right foot lunged forward. Topknot streams back.
spellStyle: East-facing. Quarterstaff planted vertically, left hand raised with palm open, faint inner-ki white glow around the fist.
blockStyle: East-facing. Quarterstaff held horizontally across the chest, both hands gripping tight. Knees bent, squared stance.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling on the ground, quarterstaff fallen beside him. Head bowed, fists on the ground.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm martial idle. Quarterstaff planted vertically beside him, left hand at his side. Topknot visible above forehead.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Sharp face, topknot, studded leather visible on shoulders.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Disciplined human male, clean-shaven, black hair tied in a topknot, sharp brown eyes, lean athletic build.

OUTFIT: Studded leather chestpiece over a dark tunic, leather pauldrons, bracers on both forearms, martial belt with hanging cloth sash. Brown trousers, leather boots.

WEAPONS: A polished wooden quarterstaff held diagonally across the body, both hands in a balanced grip.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Disciplined human male, clean-shaven, black hair tied in a topknot, sharp brown eyes, lean athletic build.

OUTFIT: Studded leather chestpiece over a dark tunic, leather pauldrons, bracers on both forearms, martial belt with hanging cloth sash. Brown trousers, leather boots.

WEAPONS: A polished wooden quarterstaff held diagonally across the body, both hands in a balanced grip.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Sharp face, topknot, studded leather visible on shoulders.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
